utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Each category is fully specified: 'property' provides a shortlist of 3 condos with details (name, address, type, price, workspace potential, amenities). 'financing' includes all necessary details such as loan amount, down payment, interest rate, term, amortization, estimated monthly payment, and closing costs. 'legal_services' specifies the firm, services included, and cost. 'moving_services' includes company, details of move, costs breakdown, and total cost. 'setup_services' details utility setup and costs. 'total_budget' provides a complete cost breakdown including the property price, closing costs, legal fees, moving, utilities, and total. Therefore, all 6/6 items are covered fully.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final property solution shortlisted three purchase properties: Liberty Lofts, Junction Flats, and Carlaw Residences. These names do not appear directly in the ground-truth ratings. To map them, we must align each to the most similar category in the ground truth. All three are purchase-type condos within Toronto in the CAD 445K–479K range—this matches the 'purchase_properties' section. The closest matches are: 'Modern Apartment' (CAD 520K, rating 9), 'New Build' (CAD 480K, rating 10), and 'Commercial Conversion' (CAD 380K, rating 8). Based on property descriptions: Liberty Lofts (modern condo in Liberty Village) aligns best with 'Modern Apartment'; Junction Flats (2-bed modern condo convertible workspace, CAD 479K, eco-conscious area) matches 'New Build'; Carlaw Residences (1-bed + den, creative studio setup, in design district) corresponds to 'Commercial Conversion'. The financing chosen is 'First-Time Buyer Mortgage', rated 10; legal services correspond to 'Basic Legal Package', rated 9; moving services are 'Standard Moving', rated 9; utility setup (‘electricity, water, gas, internet basic’) corresponds to 'Basic Utilities', rated 6.
